label: Refresh
description: Run the daily refresh pipeline and rebuild generated vault context.

label: Sync Apple Notes
description: Import the configured Brain Dump Apple Note and attachments.

label: Context
description: Regenerate agent context, dashboard, schedules, and rollups.

label: Inventory
description: Show context folders, task statuses, epics, and projects.

label: Content Schedules
description: Generate current content schedules from cadence config.

label: Refresh Schedule Status
description: Show refresh LaunchAgent state and last run date.

label: Refresh Schedule Register
description: Register the macOS LaunchAgent for daily refresh.

label: Refresh Schedule Unregister
description: Unload and remove the macOS LaunchAgent for daily vault refresh.

label: Attachments Dry Run
description: Preview attachment routing and cleanup without changing files.

label: Attachments Apply
description: Move note attachments into owning context attachment folders.

label: Epic Views Sync
description: Regenerate per-epic task Bases and master epic views.

label: GCal List Week
description: List the next week of Google Calendar events as JSON.

label: GCal Ensure Calendars
description: Ensure required vault Google Calendars exist.

label: GCal Sync Tasks Dry Run
description: Preview TaskNotes date sync with Google Calendar.

label: GCal Sync Tasks
description: Apply the two-way TaskNotes due/scheduled mirror with Google Calendar.

label: Obsidian Profile Backup
description: Back up root Obsidian config under system backup.

label: Backup Sync Status
description: Show rclone remotes, sources, mounts, logs, and locks.

label: Backup Sync Overview
description: Show backup/sync jobs, mounts, progress, and processes.

label: Backup Sync Progress
description: Parse latest rclone transfer stats from active or recent logs.

label: Backup Sync Setup
description: Run the interactive rclone Google Drive backup/sync setup wizard.

label: Backup Shared Drives
description: Manage Shared Drive remotes and read-only mounts.

label: Backup Sync Pause
description: Stop managed syncs and mounts, then set pause flags.

label: Backup Sync Resume
description: Clear pause flags and let supervisor remount drives.

label: Backup Sync Clean Uninstall
description: Remove automation, runtime, locks, state, and managed mounts for backup/sync.

label: Bootstrap Export Dry Run
description: Preview public bootstrap vault export from the current vault.

label: Bootstrap Export
description: Export public bootstrap vault files into the configured export root.

label: Release Publish Dry Run
description: Preview SemVer public vault release, dependency lock, export, commit, tag, push, and GitHub release.

label: Release Publish
description: Publish the next patch SemVer public vault release.

label: Dependency Repos Status
description: Show external dependency repo checkout state and managed projection health.

label: Dependency Repos Dry Run
description: Preview dependency repo pulls and projection rebuilds.

label: Dependency Repos Sync
description: Pull dependency repos and rebuild managed projections.

label: Upgrade Status
description: Show public bootstrap upgrade state and latest report pointer.

label: Upgrade Doctor
description: Check bootstrap upgrade state and hidden Git wiring.

label: Upgrade Dry Run
description: Preview upgrade changes and write an upgrade report.

label: Upgrade
description: Apply vault upgrade and sync dependency projections.

label: Upgrade Repair Prompt
description: Print a repair prompt for the latest upgrade report.

label: Git Maintenance
description: Keep vault Git history shallow and prune objects.

label: Mobile Profile
description: Refresh the safe mobile Obsidian profile.

label: Profile Upgrade Dry Run
description: Preview Obsidian profile and plugin updates.

label: Profile Upgrade Apply
description: Apply Obsidian profile and plugin updates.

label: Path Audit
description: Find persisted vault-root paths that would break after moving the vault.

label: Folder Register
description: Register an existing context folder and regenerate vault wiring.

label: Brain Dump Triage Prepare
description: Create Brain Dump organizer backups/proposals and maintain the triage Base.
